overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest trail at night in a video game environment. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing narrow dirt paths surrounded by thick vegetation and trees under a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest hiking trail surrounded by dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight while navigating through dense forest vegetation

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail illuminated by flashlight, surrounded by tall grass and leaves
thick bushes and small trees lining the left side of the trail
thick bushes and small trees lining the right side of the trail
dark night sky visible through gaps in the forest canopy above the path
tall coniferous tree trunk visible among the undergrowth on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight that casts light on the path ahead. Dense vegetation and undergrowth flank both sides of the trail, with tree trunks and branches forming a canopy overhead. The dark night sky is partially visible through gaps in the trees, creating an enclosed and immersive woodland atmosphere typical of a survival or horror game environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that maintains a tense, immersive atmosphere under the cover of night. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal the immediate terrain. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the light catches the dense vegetation and thick undergrowth flanking the trail. The scene then tightens as the camera moves beneath a heavy canopy of interlocking tree trunks and branches, before finally glancing upward toward the dark night sky visible through the gaps in the foliage.
